title: Fields & Feasts
description: A relaxing farming modpack that takes away the stress of everything else!
body:
Grow diverse crops, raise animals, cook delicious meals, and expand your farm with charming cottages, detailed decorations, and elegant architectural touches. With seasonal mechanics, realistic farming tools, and quality-of-life enhancements, you can focus on the simple joys of life: planting, harvesting, and sharing the fruits of your labor.

Whether you’re tending your fields, exploring new crops, or designing the perfect farmhouse, Fields & Feasts is your escape to a more relaxing Minecraft experience. No need to worry about dying to mobs as keep inventory is always on. Just relax and farm for a bit!

Over 100+ mods that are all aimed at making farming and just experiencing minecraft more enjoyable!

Features:

🍅 Extensive crop and animal variety with Farmer’s Delight, Croptopia, and Enhanced Farming

🏡 Building and decoration mods like Macaw’s Roofs, Adorn, and Beautify

🌿 Immersive seasonal cycles and realistic growth mechanics

🍳 Cooking, crafting, and automation enhancements to make life on the farm easier

🌞 Relaxed, peaceful survival gameplay, no rush, just the joys of farming and building
